global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on a flash sale announcement and product images.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale with a clear call to action.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular outlines representing product images are centered in the ad, with a simple line drawing style.

elements.label: three product images
elements.description: Another set of three rectangular outlines representing product images, similar in style to the previous element.

elements.label: three product images
elements.description: A third set of three rectangular outlines for product images, maintaining the same minimalist design.

elements.label: flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: shop now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button with the text '€19.99 Shop now' is positioned at the bottom, inviting immediate action.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' is displayed at the top left in a simple, modern font.

elements.label: sale badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, drawing attention to the promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' is located at the top left, indicating user-generated content.
